notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Tyler Freeman to 3rd. Cole Carrigg out at 2nd. Edouard Julien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Tyler Freeman to 3rd. Cole Carrigg out at 2nd. Edouard Julien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braxton Fulford pops out to shortstop Jared Triolo on the infield fly rule.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros. Jake Mangum to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy singles on a soft ground ball to second baseman Brandon Lowe. Kyle Karros scores. Throwing error by second baseman Brandon Lowe.
